meaning: n.车辙,常轨,定例,惯例v.在...形成车辙
examples: Many home sellers remain stuck in a recessional rut.
I gave up my job because I felt I was stuck in a rut.
I don't like being in a rut – I like to keep moving on.
He'd struck out in all four at-bats Friday night, leaving him in a 1-for-42 rut.
Since you pursue new experiences with some regularity, you are not in a rut.
